title: biscutella coronaria
intro: Biscutella coronaria, also known as the crow garlic or Cornish biscutel, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which provide health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Biscutella coronaria is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects, and it is also used in homeopathic medicine due to its purported ability to stimulate the body's natural healing processes.
